Pushed. The CI had 3 errors in `crates/tools/src/sandbox/tests.rs`, all caused by Linux-vs-macOS cfg mismatches:

1. **`use super::apple::*`** was gated with `cfg(any(target_os = "macos", test))` but the `apple` module itself is only declared with `cfg(target_os = "macos")`.
